violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Multiple wet cloths on food contact surfaces.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Pork thawing in prep sink in water. Needs to be thawed under cold running water or under refrigeration.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Dispose of all scratched teflon pans.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean ice catcher in ice machine. -Clean soda dispenser at drive up.

Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. -Need to shorten drain hoses from soda dispenser so they sit above the plane of the floor drain.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling need more thorough cleaning.
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Need to shorten drain lines on soda dispenser. Need to have a physical air gap between lines and floor drain.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Ground beef and pork need to be stored below whole muscle beef and pork-in walk in cooler.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -Cool pans of cooked beef, pork and chicken in walk in cooler. Will not cool fast enough in cooler trays below flat top. (Beef still at 98F after 1:45 minutes. Moved to walk in cooler.)

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Teflon pans with scratches need to be disposed of. -Walk in freezer needs defrosted. Is icing up. May need repair.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors in kitchen, prep area and walk in cooler need repainted or sealed.
